pages.text: Broken legs... While a broken bone is not usually deadly, it is a severe condition which can cause any animal to not be able to hunt or flee by themselves, which can eventually cause their death. Broken bones don't heal on their own, and will need a long treatment for a cat to fully recover their mobility.$(br2)Luckily, a cat can only break a bone if they fall from really high, but it is still always better to be careful. $(br)
pages.title: Broken Leg
Broken Leg
pages.text: A broken bone must be treated by keeping it steady and in place while it heals. A Leg Wrap, made usually with sticks and vines or leaves, is placed on the bone to help it remain steady. After that, it will just be a matter of time until the bone fully heals.$(br)

pages.title: Broken Leg
pages.text: After a broken bone is treated with a Leg Wrap, applying Comfrey Poultice on it will also help the bone heal faster. Only for this reason, Comfrey is definitely a "must have" in every clan!$(br)
